body: The README SHALL contain managed badge and schema_version reference blocks. The updater script SHALL derive schema_version from the runtime schema constant and migration coverage from the migration path inventory, then rewrite only those managed blocks.
summary: The README SHALL contain managed badge and schema_version reference blocks. The updater script SHALL derive schema_version from the runtime schema constant and migration coverage from the migration path inventory, then rewrite only those managed blocks.
title: README schema_version badge automation
